description: B2B Rocket is an AI sales platform that automates lead generation and multichannel outreach with AI agents.
overview: B2B Rocket uses AI agents to automate B2B lead generation, data enrichment, and multichannel outreach across email, calls, and social, working alongside your CRM.
what_is: B2B Rocket is a sales acceleration platform that automates outreach with AI agents. It combines a large contact database with AI-driven agents to handle lead generation, data management, and multichannel contact across email, calls, and social.

It is strongest for outreach, lead enrichment, and automated campaigns, with engagement tracked as leads are discovered. B2B Rocket integrates with the CRM for enrichment, validation, and sequencing, and focuses on outbound sales rather than broader CRM functions.
